details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that meets all core rubric requirements. The package structure is correct with proper dependencies (@prisma/dmmf, @prisma/generator, @prisma/generator-helper). The entry point (bin.ts) properly uses generatorHandler with both onManifest and onGenerate callbacks. The generator reads DMMF datamodel and generates complete CRUD clients for each model: TypeScript interfaces, CreateInput/UpdateInput types, and model client classes with all five required methods (findMany, findUnique, create, update, delete) with proper async/await and correct HTTP verbs. Type mapping is comprehensive (scalars, enums, lists, optionals). Auto-generated field detection correctly identifies fields to exclude from create input. Output is properly written to the specified directory. Code follows TypeScript conventions with proper types, JSDoc comments, and private fields. Integration into the monorepo is complete (tsconfig.build.bundle.json, GitHub workflow). Comprehensive test suite validates all functionality. Minor deduction only for the empty PLAN.md file, which is a non-functional artifact.
